seo.title: Velvet Pour - Sip the Spirit of Summer
seo.description: Sip the Spirit of Summer at Velvet Pour. Explore handcrafted cocktails and mocktails, bartending philosophy, featured recipes, and visit us in Los Angeles.

hero.title: MOJITO
hero.descriptionLine1: Every cocktail on our menu is a blend of premium ingredients, creative flair, and
hero.descriptionLine2: timeless recipes - designed to delight your senses.

philosophy.title: Where every detail matters - from muddle to garnish
philosophy.paragraph: Every cocktail we serve is a reflection of our obsession with detail - from the first muddle to the final garnish. That care is what turns a simple drink into something truly memorable.
philosophy.moreThanCustomers: More than +{count} customer | More than +{count} customers

alt.guestsEnjoying: Guests enjoying cocktails at the bar
alt.cocktailRow: Assorted colorful cocktails in a row

art.title: The ART
art.subtitle: Sip-Worthy Perfection
art.heading: Made with Craft and Poured with Passion
art.description: This isn't just a drink. It's a carefully crafted moment made just for you.

slides.name: Classic Mojito
slides.title: Simple Ingredients, Bold Flavor
slides.description: Made with tequila, lime juice, and orange liqueur, the Margarita is easy to make and full of character. Add a salted rim for the perfect drink on summer nights.
slides.alt: Classic Mojito in a tall cocktail glass

slides.name: Raspberry Mojito
slides.title: A Zesty Classic That Never Fails
slides.description: The Margarita is a classic that balances tangy lime, smooth tequila, and a touch of sweetness. Shaken, frozen, or on the rocks - it's always crisp and refreshing.
slides.alt: Raspberry Mojito in a tall cocktail glass

slides.name: Violet Breeze
slides.title: Simple Ingredients, Bold Flavor
slides.description: Made with tequila, lime juice, and orange liqueur, the Margarita is easy to make and full of character. Add a salted rim for the perfect drink on summer nights.
slides.alt: Violet Breeze cocktail in a tall glass

slides.name: Curacao Mojito
slides.title: Crafted With Care, Poured With Love
slides.description: Each cocktail is made with fresh ingredients and a passion for perfecting every pour, whether you're celebrating or simply relaxing.
slides.alt: Curacao Mojito in a tall cocktail glass

footer.title: Where to Find Us
footer.address: Baba Nest, Sri Panwa, 88 Sakdidej Rd, Wichit, Phuket 83000
